action: Asymmetric profile contract: the bridge HARD-REQUIRES a loadable profile at launch (launch.go LoadProfile → ExitBadFlags 10 on a missing file) while the runner TOLERATES the same missing file at CLI-resolution time (runner.go ~277 builds profilePath unconditionally; ~290 loader.Get miss → prof=nil → source=default) and passes the nonexistent path through to the bridge — so any runner-dispatchable agent without .evolve/profiles/<name>.json dies at launch the FIRST time its route fires. Cycle-270: the ship-error recovery route (GIT_FF_MERGE_DIVERGED → debugger) had never actually launched because debugger.json never existed (added 52866168). Persona↔profile pairing audit 2026-06-10: remaining unpaired non-reference personas = operator, swarm-planner, reflection-authoring-step, agent-templates — if any is runner-dispatched it hits the same wall. phasecoherence deliberately SKIPS unpaired pairs (coherence_test.go ~25 'either side missing → pair silently skipped'), so the gap class is invisible to the existing meta-gate. Fix direction (pick ONE home, no dual semantics): (a) preflight/coherence invariant — enumerate runner-dispatchable agents (spine registry + recovery routes + advisor-insertable phase index) and assert each has a tracked, LoadProfile-valid profile; or (b) runner fails fast at resolution with a typed error naming the missing file instead of dispatching a doomed launch. Acceptance: deleting .evolve/profiles/debugger.json turns into a preflight FAIL or unit-test FAIL that NAMES the missing file; no runtime exit=10 path remains for this class.
